pkgmetadata.longdescription: S3cmd lets you copy files fromto Amazon S3(Simple Storage Service) using a simple to usecommand line client. Supports rsync-like backup,GPG encryption, and more. Also supports managementof Amazons CloudFront content delivery network.Authors-------- Florent Viard florentsodria.com Michal Ludvig michallogix.cz Matt Domsch (github.commdomsch)
